title: Context Capsule
description: The bounded context package delivered to a sub-agent. Contains everything the agent is allowed to know and nothing else.

capsule_id.description: Unique capsule identifier, derived from task_id + run timestamp

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the capsule was built

task_contract_ref.description: Path to the task_contract.yaml this capsule is based on

sha.description: Git SHA of the snapshot for integrity

current_state_snapshot.description: A frozen reference to the canonical current state

required_files.description: Files the agent must read before acting, with their verified SHAs

forbidden_actions.description: e.g. 'Do not modify runtime/', 'Do not change public contracts'

evidence_schema_ref.description: Path to the evidence_bundle.schema.json the worker's output must conform to

capsule_hash.description: SHA-256 of the entire capsule for tamper evidence. Worker echoes this in their evidence bundle.
